headline: ₹10-30 Cr at risk (CSR/marketing outlay, not core revenue) — IDFC First Bank's cricket sponsorship boosts brand visibility and community impact, with limited financial materiality.
what_matters: No P/E rerating or margin impact; revenue at risk is negligible.
BRSR, GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks triggered, but only for disclosure; no penalty or deadline risk.
No material change to cost of capital or bond spreads; FII flows unaffected.
